summary: Iteration 28: ePaper PDF Generation Testing - Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: PDF download button and all UI elements verified. PDF correctly uses Playfair Display, PT Serif, and Noto Serif Telugu fonts. CMYK footer dots present.

passed_tests: GET /api/epaper/editions - Returns 34+ editions with correct structure (date, slot, article_count)
GET /api/epaper/2026-03-16?lang=en&slot=evening - Returns 270 articles with correct structure
GET /api/epaper/2026-03-16/pdf?lang=en&slot=evening - Generates valid PDF with Playfair Display, PT Serif fonts
GET /api/epaper/2026-03-16/pdf?lang=te&slot=evening - Generates valid PDF with Noto Serif Telugu fonts (7 pages, 6.5MB)
PDF contains images (11 images per page)
PDF has CMYK dots (●) in footer
PDF has 'KAIZER NEWS' masthead on page 1
Frontend /epaper page loads with KAIZER NEWS masthead visible
Frontend PDF download button works - downloads 5.2MB PDF
Frontend AM/PM slot toggle visible and functional
Frontend date picker shows correct date

pdf_structure.masthead: KAIZER NEWS in large font on page 1

critical_code_review_comments: epaper.py: PDF generation correctly uses WeasyPrint with Google Fonts @import
epaper.py: fontTools monkey-patch handles Telugu font subsetting (bits > 122)
epaper.py: HTML template matches NewspaperPage.jsx layout (hero+sub grid, mid/bottom/tail sections)
epaper.py: CMYK footer with colored dots implemented correctly
EpaperPage.jsx: Clean download function with axios blob response type and 60s timeout
NewspaperPage.jsx: Proper font families declared (Playfair Display, PT Serif, Noto Serif Telugu)
seed_data_creation: None - uses real MongoDB article data
context_for_next_testing_agent: ePaper PDF generation fully tested. English PDFs use Playfair Display + PT Serif fonts. Telugu PDFs use Noto Serif Telugu fonts. PDFs have KAIZER NEWS masthead, CMYK footer dots, multiple pages with images. Frontend download button at /epaper works correctly. PDF generation takes 30-60 seconds due to font fetching.
